sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id INTEGER, duration INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO test_intervals VALUES (1, INTERVAL '14 months');
SELECT extract('month' FROM duration) AS month_extracted FROM test_intervals WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_intervals SET duration = duration + INTERVAL '2 months' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, duration, extract('month' FROM duration) AS adjusted_month FROM test_intervals;
